content.problemStatement:
ChefX showed ChefY his new pizza slice design. The design is a planar figure that can be drawn in the following way:


Draw a point A0\mathsf{A}_0A0вАЛ and two rays from this point such that the angle between them is ќ±<ѕА/2\alpha \lt \pi/2ќ±<ѕА/2.
Mark NNN points A1,A2,A3,вА¶,AN\mathsf{A}_1, \mathsf{A}_2, \mathsf{A}_3, \ldots, \mathsf{A}_NA1вАЛ,A2вАЛ,A3вАЛ,вА¶,ANвАЛ on one ray in this order (A1\mathsf{A}_1A1вАЛ is closest to A0\mathsf{A}_0A0вАЛ).
Mark NNN points B1,B2,B3,вА¶,BN\mathsf{B}_1, \mathsf{B}_2, \mathsf{B}_3, \ldots, \mathsf{B}_NB1вАЛ,B2вАЛ,B3вАЛ,вА¶,BNвАЛ on the other ray in this order (B1\mathsf{B}_1B1вАЛ is closest to A0\mathsf{A}_0A0вАЛ).
For each valid iii, draw a line segment between points Ai\mathsf{A}_iAiвАЛ and Bi+1\mathsf{B}_{i+1}Bi+1вАЛ.
For each valid iii, draw a line segment between points Bi\mathsf{B}_iBiвАЛ and Ai+1\mathsf{A}_{i+1}Ai+1вАЛ.
Finally, draw a line segment between points AN\mathsf{A}_NANвАЛ and BN\mathsf{B}_NBNвАЛ.
All these 2NвИТ12N-12NвИТ1 line segments must have equal lengths, which must also be equal to вИ£A0A1вИ£=вИ£A0B1вИ£|\mathsf{A}_0\mathsf{A}_1| = |\mathsf{A}_0\mathsf{B}_1|вИ£A0вАЛA1вАЛвИ£=вИ£A0вАЛB1вАЛвИ£.
The result should look roughly like this:


ChefY wants to show ChefX that he does not know his own design very well. He asks ChefX to compute the angle between three of the marked points in this figure. It is clear that there are only four types of angles:


вИ†AxAyBz\angle \mathsf{A}_x\mathsf{A}_y\mathsf{B}_zвИ†AxвАЛAyвАЛBzвАЛ
вИ†AxByAz\angle \mathsf{A}_x\mathsf{B}_y\mathsf{A}_zвИ†AxвАЛByвАЛAzвАЛ
вИ†AxByBz\angle \mathsf{A}_x\mathsf{B}_y\mathsf{B}_zвИ†AxвАЛByвАЛBzвАЛ
вИ†BxAyBz\angle \mathsf{B}_x\mathsf{A}_y\mathsf{B}_zвИ†BxвАЛAyвАЛBzвАЛ
Can you help ChefX find the angle ChefY asks for? It can be proved that under the given constraints, each angle can be written as ѕАвЛЕm/n\pi \cdot m / nѕАвЛЕm/n, where mmm and nnn are coprime integers; you should find mmm and nnn.
constraints: each angle is between three of the points A0,A1,вА¶,AN,B1,вА¶,BNA_0, A_1, \ldots, A_N, B_1, \ldots, B_NA0вАЛ,A1вАЛ,вА¶,ANвАЛ,B1вАЛ,вА¶,BNвАЛ
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains five space-separated integers NNN, ttt, xxx, yyy and zzz. Here, ttt denotes the type of the angle as listed above.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print a single line containing two space-separated integers mmm and nnn.
